ASHANVIL.SettingsAutomationHint: When enabled, the system applies rolls and updates where automation is implemented.
ASHANVIL.SettingsVerboseLoggingHint: Print detailed diagnostic messages to the browser console (F12). Useful for development and troubleshooting.
ASHANVIL.SettingsDebugRulesHint: Log additional detail while resolving rules (for development).
ASHANVIL.SettingsRulesProfileHint: Baseline rules profile for this world. Individual mechanics will read this during planning.
